user_query: What did Andrew learn from reading books about ecological systems?

node_data.text: Andrew enjoys watching birds in nature and has read books about ecological systems.

node_data.text: Andrew believes that nature is interconnected and humans need to take care of it.

node_data.text: Andrew suggests reducing carbon footprint by biking or using public transport.
